What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
D
David B.

Manuel's Glass did an excellent job replacing all the windows in my Craftsman bungalow in Belmont Heights. They were professional, efficient, and the new windows look fantastic. I can already feel the difference in terms of noise reduction and energy efficiency. Highly recommend!

M
Maria S.

I had a cracked window pane in my living room, and Manuel's Glass was able to repair it quickly and affordably. The technician was friendly and knowledgeable, and the repair was seamless. I'm very happy with the service.

J
John K.

Manuel's Glass replaced the storefront windows at my business in downtown Long Beach. They did a great job coordinating the project and minimizing disruption to my business. The new windows look great and have significantly improved the appearance of my storefront.

L
Lisa R.

We had Manuel's Glass install a custom bay window in our kitchen, and it's absolutely stunning. The craftsmanship is impeccable, and it has completely transformed the look and feel of our kitchen. The team was great to work with from start to finish.

Manuel's Glass — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every window replacement company project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Manuel's Glass Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific window replacement company needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Long Beach & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Long Beach, CA and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Los Angeles Pasadena Irvine Santa Clarita Torrance Long Beach Glendale Burbank
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our window replacement company services.

How long does a typical window replacement project take?

Most residential window replacement projects take between one to three days, depending on the number of windows and the complexity of the installation. We always strive to minimize disruption to your daily routine.

What type of windows are best for energy efficiency in Long Beach?

Low-E glass windows with insulated frames are highly recommended for Long Beach homes. They help reduce heat transfer, keeping your home cooler in the summer and warmer in the winter, which can lead to significant energy savings.

Do you offer any warranties on your window replacement services?

Yes, we offer comprehensive warranties on both the windows themselves and our installation services. We stand behind our workmanship and are committed to ensuring your complete satisfaction.

Built on Long Beach Values

Request a free consultation and discover the difference new windows can make.
